blocks.content: That one hit. He felt it.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I came to you. That's why I left that party and not with her — because I came to you. I told you tonight specifically because I didn't want to carry it. And you're treating me like I did something wrong.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Because I was figuring out how to say it. That's not the same as lying to you.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: How do I know you didn't have sex with her, Kit? You couldn't even tell me about a kiss without me finding out another way.
The words sat on the line between them. He breathed.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I thought we were past the Brooke thing.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: I thought you'd stop editing what you tell me.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I'm telling you now. Nothing happened. I came honest to you knowing there's a girl here who wanted to go that route and I said no. Why would I ruin what we have for what people call fun? You really think I'd do that.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: I don't know what I think right now.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: He asks you to coffee. He stays after group. He's got a lot of thoughts that seem specifically aimed at you.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Then we're the same. Nothing happened with either of us.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: You edited it, Kit. That's the difference.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: And you haven't told me everything Jordan's said to you either, have you.
